name: aikit
description: MCP-backed skills for MSP operations, security/compliance, and HR/payroll -- plus the orchestrate coding meta-agent.

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Multi-agent coding orchestrator that drives whole-codebase build, fix, audit, and refactor work through subagents with real execution and independent verification, multi-stage planning, a project-independent browser-driven UI/UX test swarm, and a docs/ single source of truth it auto-maintains.

plugins.name: msp-ops
plugins.description: Core MSP daily drivers: morning cross-platform briefing, ticket triage, NinjaOne fleet health, M365 offboarding, BEC rapid response, and Spanning backup health. Covers NinjaOne, ConnectWise, CIPP, Auvik, and Kaseya Spanning.

plugins.name: security-compliance
plugins.description: Security and compliance skills: Vanta audit readiness and evidence gap hunting, KnowBe4 user risk heatmaps, and ThreatLocker approval queue triage and forensic investigations.

plugins.name: hr-payroll
plugins.description: HR and payroll skills: Paylocity roster snapshots, new-hire onboarding gap analysis, pay-rate audits, plus workforce people analytics and compensation benchmarking.
